verification_gate: Every observed asset has identity, owner, telemetry provenance, simulation representation, privacy boundary, failure mode, and proof; observation causes no physical mutation.

covers_ten_goal_tasks.note: The observation_task field of the ten work items is exactly the ten read-only task types named in the HOME-001 goal.

every_asset_has_identity.note: Every surface carries a non-empty identity key. All ten share one join key: the HOME-001-B canonical identity {hardware_id, service_instance, usd_prim_path, first_seen, owner_person_ref}; the spatial half of that key is the LPS-033/LPS-034 twin prim path.

redb (transient high-frequency tier + ge: HOME-001-A raw scan buffer + BLAKE3 dedup
envctl (forward-only bridge + projection: redb -> embed -> PostgreSQL flush for all high-frequency surfaces
OS keyring (external-secret/provenance f: device credentials never accessed; only references/provenance stored (HOME-001-B, HOME-001-I)

every_asset_has_owner.note: Every owner assignment traces to a named STORE-001 state_class_assignment; no home class is a second durable writer for a PostgreSQL-owned class; no cloud vector sidecar.

every_asset_has_telemetry_provenance.note: Every surface stamps the read-only provenance tuple on each record; geometry provenance for the twin is the LPS-029 -> LPS-031 -> LPS-032 -> LPS-033 chain.

every_asset_has_simulation_representatio.note: HOME-001-E is the single simulation representation; every physical asset in A/B/F/G/H/I/J binds to a twin prim; environment fields (J) map to LPS-032 segmented instances; network-only assets bind to a HOME-001-C topology node.

every_asset_has_privacy_boundary.note: Every surface states a privacy tier and keeps data inside the local trust boundary (local PostgreSQL, No-Sidecar, UDS); raw secrets/credentials are never accessed or stored (references only, secrets remain in the OS keyring); no cloud sink.

every_asset_has_failure_mode.note: Every surface has a safe failure mode: redb application-level WAL on PostgreSQL outage; stale/unknown marking on sensor dropout; twin rejection on LPS-035 gate failure; MinCut isolation of inconsistent subgraphs; identity quarantine on conflict. No failure path ever actuates a device.

every_asset_has_proof.note: Every surface names its verification: PostgreSQL row/provenance checks and forward-flush receipts for A/B/C/D/F/G/H/I/J; LPS-035 four-gate + usdchecker (LPS-033) + watertight (LPS-031) + immutable-base layer diff (LPS-034) for the twin (E).

observation_causes_no_physical_mutation.note: Every work item is read-only and carries an explicit no_physical_mutation statement; the family is only the read/parse half of the CodeDB-style ingestion pipeline (sense -> redb buffer -> envctl bridge -> PostgreSQL); physical control is deferred to a later gated-physical-control phase per LIFEOS-009 next_action; LPS-034 base-scan-immutability doctrine governs the twin.

store_001_alignment.canonical_durable_owner: PostgreSQL + RuVector (No-Sidecar native extension) owns home identity, topology, provenance, and durable history exactly once
store_001_alignment.transient_tier: redb buffers discovery/telemetry, holds the BLAKE3 dedup cache, runs geometry-engine distance math over twin vectors, and acts as the application-level WAL
store_001_alignment.forward_only_bridge: envctl bridges redb -> embed -> PostgreSQL and projects the twin; no undirected dual-write
store_001_alignment.verified_no_reclassification: No existing durable class is silently reclassified; the home family adds only read-only observation and does not move any CodeDB blob class off redb-durable (that remains STORE-001's BlobStore SHA-256 parity cutover concern).

proof_summary: HOME-001 defines the read-only home operating-domain observation family in generated/task_families/HOME-001.json as ten observation surfaces (HOME-001-A discovery, B identity, C topology, D telemetry, E digital-twin, F resource, G media, H appliance, I network, J environment) that exactly match the ten task types named in the goal. Every one of the ten surfaces carries all seven attributes the gate demands - identity, owner, telemetry provenance, simulation representation, privacy boundary, failure mode, and proof - plus an explicit no_physical_mutation statement and a decision. Owner assignments are grounded once each in the STORE-001 tiered model: PostgreSQL + RuVector is the single canonical durable owner of home identity, topology (as a native RuVector graph, No-Sidecar), provenance, and durable history; redb is the transient high-frequency tier that buffers discovery and telemetry samples, holds the BLAKE3 dedup cache, runs geometry-engine distance math over twin vectors, and acts as the application-level WAL during PostgreSQL outage; envctl is the forward-only bridge (redb -> embed -> PostgreSQL) and the twin projection engine; device credentials are never accessed and remain in the OS keyring. The digital-twin surface (HOME-001-E) reconciles the existing worldsim rows LPS-029 through LPS-036 - it consumes their validated USD twin (LiDAR capture, watertight mesh, segmentation, USD composition, immutable base layer with colliders, four-gate acceptance, Genesis feasibility) read-only and honors the LPS-034 doctrine that agent code must never mutate the base scan layer. The whole family is the read/parse half of the CodeDB-style ingestion pipeline and emits zero device-control, network-mutation, purchase, utility-change, or credential-access operations; physical control is explicitly deferred to a later gated-physical-control phase per LIFEOS-009 next_action. A validator over the family confirmed all ten surfaces present, all seven gate attributes non-empty on every surface, ids unique, every owner tracing to a STORE-001 store, every item read-only, and the twin reconciliation covering LPS-029..LPS-036. No product code, schema, database, or live data was produced; product_execution_performed is false.

live_commands.purpose: Validate HOME-001 family against every clause of the verification gate: ten surfaces, all seven gate attributes non-empty on each, ids unique, every owner traces to a STORE-001 store, every item read-only/mutation-free, twin reconciles LPS-029..LPS-036
